home.metaDescription: Premium gamified e-commerce — commerce, customization, and progression. Browse our collection.
home.heroSubtitle: Experience the pinnacle of craftsmanship and design. Our exclusive collection is designed for those who demand excellence.
home.noNewArrivals: No new arrivals in this category yet.
home.artGalleryDescription: Discover exclusive art pieces and customer creations.
home.freeShippingBenefit: Free shipping on orders over CHF 100
home.homeMetaTitle: DarkMonkey — Custom Streetwear & Premium Apparel | Design Your Own
home.comingSoonDescription: We're currently updating our products. Check back soon!
home.socialSubtitle: Follow us on social media and be the first to know about new drops, exclusive discounts and behind-the-scenes content.
home.customSubtitle: Have a design in mind? Send us your images, sketches or references and we'll print your vision on premium clothing — exactly the way you want it.
home.customStep1Desc: Gather your images, sketches or visual references. The more detail you share, the closer the result will be to your vision.
home.customStep2Desc: Email us at support@dark-monkey.ch with your files and a description of what you want — garment type, colors, placement and quantity.
home.customStep3Desc: Our team reviews your request, confirms details and produces your custom pieces with the same quality as our regular collection.
home.customEmailBody:
Hi Dark Monkey team,

I'd like to order a custom design. Here are the details:

- Garment type:
- Colors:
- Placement:
- Quantity:
- Description:

[Attach your images here]

Thank you!

footer.supportDescription: We're here to help you with anything.
footer.ticketDesc: Track your issue, we'll respond fast.

gdpr.pageSubtitle: Manage your personal data and privacy preferences
gdpr.yourRights: Your rights under GDPR / Swiss DSG
gdpr.rightAccess: Access all data we hold about you
gdpr.rightPortability: Download your data in a portable format (JSON)
gdpr.rightErasure: Request deletion of your account and personal data
gdpr.rightContact: Contact us at privacy@dark-monkey.ch for any data queries
gdpr.exportDescription: Download a copy of all personal data we hold about you, including your profile, orders, addresses, reviews, and activity. The file will be in JSON format.
gdpr.exportError: Failed to export data. Please try again.
gdpr.deleteDescription: Request permanent deletion of your account and all associated personal data. Orders are anonymised and retained for legal accounting purposes. This process is completed within 30 days.
gdpr.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. Your account, profile, addresses, wishlist, and reviews will be permanently deleted.
gdpr.deleteReasonPlaceholder: Optional: tell us why you're leaving (helps us improve)
gdpr.deleteSuccess: Deletion request submitted. We'll process it within 30 days.
gdpr.deleteError: Failed to submit deletion request. Please try again.
gdpr.deleteSubmittedDescription: Your deletion request has been received. We will process it within 30 days and confirm via email.
gdpr.deletePendingNotice: You have a pending deletion request submitted on {date}. We will complete it within 30 days.
gdpr.gdprContact: For data queries or complaints, contact our data protection officer:

forgotPassword.checkEmailReset: Check your email for the reset link.

privacy.title: Privacy & Cookies
privacy.description: DarkMonkey privacy policy and cookie usage.
privacy.cookiesIntro: DarkMonkey uses cookies to provide essential functionality and improve your experience. By using our site, you consent to the use of these cookies.
privacy.cartCookieDesc: Stores your shopping cart so items persist across sessions (7 days).
privacy.authCookiesDesc: Used when you sign in to keep you logged in securely.
privacy.consentCookieDesc: Remembers that you accepted our cookie policy.
privacy.dataIntro: When you place an order, we collect your name, email, shipping address, and payment information (processed securely via Stripe). We use this solely to fulfill your order and communicate with you about it.
privacy.rightsIntro: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Contact us for any privacy-related inquiries.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact DarkMonkey support and customer service.
contact.intro: For orders, returns, or general questions, reach us by email. We aim to respond within 24–48 hours on business days.
contact.refundsIntro: For refunds and returns, please include your order number. For account or technical issues, describe your request and we will assist you.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: DarkMonkey terms of service and use.
terms.acceptanceIntro: By using the DarkMonkey store, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use our site or services.
terms.useOfStoreIntro: You may use our store for lawful purposes only. You may not misuse the site, attempt to gain unauthorized access, or use it in any way that could harm the service or other users.
terms.ordersPaymentIntro: Orders are subject to availability. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders. By placing an order, you agree to pay the stated price and applicable taxes and shipping.

shipping.title: Shipping policy
shipping.deliveryRegionsIntro: We ship to addresses in Europe and North America. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by country and are shown at checkout.
shipping.processingTimeIntro: Orders are processed within 2–5 business days. You will receive a confirmation email with tracking information once your order has shipped.
shipping.deliveryTimesIntro: Standard delivery typically takes 5–10 business days within Europe and 7–14 business days to North America. Express options may be available at checkout.

refund.title: Refund policy
refund.returnsIntro: You may return unused items in their original condition within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and with original tags. Contact us to request a return label and instructions.
refund.refundsProcessed: Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days after we receive the return. The amount will be credited to your original payment method.
refund.exclusionsIntro: Custom or personalized items, and items marked as final sale, are not eligible for return unless defective.

legal.title: Legal Notice (Impressum)
legal.description: DarkMonkey legal notice, company information, and contact details as required by Swiss law.
legal.uidValue: Not required (sole proprietorship below VAT threshold)
legal.disputeIntro: We are not obliged and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board. Consumers in the EU may use the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution platform at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. In Switzerland, the cantonal conciliation authority has jurisdiction.
legal.disclaimerIntro: We strive to keep the information on this site accurate and up to date. We do not warrant that the site is error-free or uninterrupted. Use of the site is at your own risk. External links are provided for convenience; we are not responsible for the content of linked sites.

reviews.title: Customer reviews
reviews.signInToReview: Sign in to write a review
reviews.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review this product.

profile.publicProfileDescription: Anyone can view your profile, wishlist, and achievements
profile.birthdayHint: Receive special offers on your birthday
profile.preferredSizeHint: Helps us recommend the right fit
profile.stylePreferencesHint: Helps us curate products for you
profile.makeProfilePublicHint: Allow others to see your wishlist and achievements

wishlist.anyoneCanView: Anyone with the link can view your wishlist
wishlist.onlyYouCanView: Only you can view your wishlist
wishlist.makePublicToShare: Make your wishlist public to share it

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about shipping, returns, and our products.
faq.shippingA1: We ship primarily to Europe and North America. Shipping costs and delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your location.
faq.shippingA2: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days in Europe and 7-14 days for North America. Express options may be available.
faq.returnsA1: You can return unused items in their original condition within 30 days. Custom items are non-refundable unless defective.
faq.paymentQ1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentA1: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
faq.productsA1: Customization is available on select premium items. Look for the 'Customizable' option on the product page.

pricing.finalPriceDesc: The price customers pay at checkout. Applied to all sizes and colors.
pricing.promoPriceDesc: Optional. If set, this appears crossed out next to the Final Price in the store — showing customers the original value (e.g. CHF 45.00 → CHF 35.00).
pricing.msrpDesc: This is the price range Printful recommends for this product based on production and fulfillment costs. It covers your base cost plus a reasonable margin. Use it as a reference — your Final Price above can be set higher or lower as you see fit.

stock.title: Stock
stock.clickToSelect: Click a row to select that variant for editing.

fields.name: Name
fields.printMethodHint: e.g. DTF (Direct to Film), DTG, Embroidery
fields.sizeGuideHint: Optional: paste a URL to a size chart image. Leave empty to use the default table.
fields.materialInfoHint: Fabric composition shown in the Material tab (e.g. 80% cotton, 20% recycled polyester)
fields.careInstructionsHint: Washing and care instructions shown in the Care & Print tab. Leave empty to use defaults.
fields.shipmentInfoHint: Delivery times, returns, print guarantee — shown in the Shipment tab on all products
fields.gpsrInfoHint: EU General Product Safety Regulation info — responsible person, manufacturer, contact
fields.openInStorefront: Open this product in the storefront (new tab)
fields.slugInvalid: Slug may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
